seo.title: TinaCMS – Open-Source Headless CMS with Visual Editing
seo.description: Combine the power of GitHub and Markdown with TinaCMS for seamless content management. Empower developers and creators to edit, preview, and manage static and dynamic sites effortlessly.

blocks.title: {Sites,} Docs and Llamas. No Dramas
blocks.subtext: Build stunning websites with TinaCMS visual editor, or create beautiful documentation with TinaDocs. Both powered by Git and built for developers who love great UX.

buttons.label: npx create-tina-app@latest
buttons.helpText: Need some help? Watch the video – see the [CLI docs](https://tina.io/docs/introduction/using-starter)

recentNewsBanner.title: What we're planning for TinaCMS v4
